languages.text: Изящные, удлиненные очертания несущих конструкций причудливо переплетаются, являя взору редчайший сплав функциональности с эстетикой. Мастер, сотворивший этот имплант, был, безусловно, художником... и вольнодумцем.

The sleek, elongated lines of the supporting structures are intricately intertwined, revealing a rare fusion of functionality and aesthetics. The craftsperson who made this implant was clearly an artist... as well as a freethinker.
languages.original_text: Изящные, удлиненные очертания несущих конструкций причудливо переплетаются, являя взору редчайший сплав функциональности с эстетикой. Мастер, сотворивший этот имплант, был, безусловно, художником... и вольнодумцем.

traits.locale_text: The sleek, elongated lines of the supporting structures are intricately intertwined, revealing a rare fusion of functionality and aesthetics. The craftsperson who made this implant was clearly an artist... as well as a freethinker.

The sleek, elongated lines of the supporting structures are intricately intertwined, revealing a rare fusion of functionality and aesthetics. The craftsperson who made this implant was clearly an artist... as well as a freethinker.

The sleek, elongated lines of the supporting structures are intricately intertwined, revealing a rare fusion of functionality and aesthetics. The craftsperson who made this implant was clearly an artist... as well as a freethinker.

languages.text: この補綴は、機能と美の融合を体現しています。この補綴を作った職人は、明らかに芸術家であり、自由な発想の持ち主でした。
languages.original_text: The sleek, elongated lines of the supporting structures are intricately intertwined, revealing a rare fusion of functionality and aesthetics. The craftsperson who made this implant was clearly an artist... as well as a freethinker.

traits.locale_text: この補綴は、機能と美の融合を体現しています。この補綴を作った職人は、明らかに芸術家であり、自由な発想の持ち主でした。

languages.text: Destek yapılarının şık ve uzun hatları, karmaşık bir şekilde iç içe geçerek işlevsellik ve estetiğin nadir bir birleşimini ortaya koyuyor. Bu implantı yapan, belli ki bir sanatçıymış... Aynı zamanda özgür düşünen bir kimseymiş.
languages.original_text: The sleek, elongated lines of the supporting structures are intricately intertwined, revealing a rare fusion of functionality and aesthetics. The craftsperson who made this implant was clearly an artist... as well as a freethinker.

traits.locale_text: Destek yapılarının şık ve uzun hatları, karmaşık bir şekilde iç içe geçerek işlevsellik ve estetiğin nadir bir birleşimini ortaya koyuyor. Bu implantı yapan, belli ki bir sanatçıymış... Aynı zamanda özgür düşünen bir kimseymiş.

languages.text: Las estructuras de soporte presentan un diseño estilizado y se entrelazan de un modo intrincado en una peculiar fusión de utilidad y estética. El artesano que fabricó este implante era claramente un artista... y también un librepensador.
languages.original_text: The sleek, elongated lines of the supporting structures are intricately intertwined, revealing a rare fusion of functionality and aesthetics. The craftsperson who made this implant was clearly an artist... as well as a freethinker.

traits.locale_text: Las estructuras de soporte presentan un diseño estilizado y se entrelazan de un modo intrincado en una peculiar fusión de utilidad y estética. El artesano que fabricó este implante era claramente un artista... y también un librepensador.

languages.text: 其流畅修长的支撑结构线条精妙地交织缠绕，展现出功能与美学的罕见融合。制作此植入物的工匠，显然是一位艺术家……同时也是一位自由思想者。
languages.original_text: The sleek, elongated lines of the supporting structures are intricately intertwined, revealing a rare fusion of functionality and aesthetics. The craftsperson who made this implant was clearly an artist... as well as a freethinker.

traits.locale_text: 其流畅修长的支撑结构线条精妙地交织缠绕，展现出功能与美学的罕见融合。制作此植入物的工匠，显然是一位艺术家……同时也是一位自由思想者。

languages.text: Les courbes épurées de son support sont délicatement entrelacées, révélant une combinaison rare de fonctionnalité et d'esthétique. Visiblement, l'artisan qui a fabriqué cet implant était un artiste... doublé d'un libre-penseur.
languages.original_text: The sleek, elongated lines of the supporting structures are intricately intertwined, revealing a rare fusion of functionality and aesthetics. The craftsperson who made this implant was clearly an artist... as well as a freethinker.

traits.locale_text: Les courbes épurées de son support sont délicatement entrelacées, révélant une combinaison rare de fonctionnalité et d'esthétique. Visiblement, l'artisan qui a fabriqué cet implant était un artiste... doublé d'un libre-penseur.

languages.text: Die eleganten Linien der tragenden Strukturen sind ineinander verschlungen und offenbaren eine seltene Kombination aus Funktionalität und Ästhetik. Der Handwerker, der dieses Implantat schuf, war eindeutig ein Künstler ... und ein Freidenker.
languages.original_text: The sleek, elongated lines of the supporting structures are intricately intertwined, revealing a rare fusion of functionality and aesthetics. The craftsperson who made this implant was clearly an artist... as well as a freethinker.
